english_text:
Sura al-Waqi'ah outline (downward): 1. Sabiqun (Elite) 2. People of Right 3. People of Left 4. Things only Allah can do 5. Greatness & Glory of Quran
Sura al-Rahman outline (upward): 1. Greatness & Glory of Quran 2. Things only Allah can do 3. People in Hellfire 4. Lower level of heaven 5. Highest level of heaven
alt_text: Two-column comparison of Sura al-Rahman (Q55, purple, reading upward 1→5) and Sura al-Waqi'ah (Q56, red, reading downward 1→5), showing how al-Waqi'ah inverts and mirrors al-Rahman's thematic order.
notes: Inter-surah chiasm: al-Rahman and al-Waqi'ah read as mirrored sequences — major example in Ismaili Quranic literary analysis.
